step_rationale: S100A12 drives vascular inflammation and plaque rupture; inhibits MMPs yet marks instability.
mechanism: S100A12 is a core plaque-rupture and vascular inflammation marker shared across atherothrombotic events; modulates MMP activity and immune activation in MI pathogenesis.

references.title: Proteogenomic Analysis of Coronary Artery Calcification in Human Populations.
Identification of core genes shared by ischemic stroke and myocardial infarction using an integrated approach.
Pleiotropic roles of S100A12 in coronary atherosclerotic plaque formation and rupture.
